input: Advanced high-value task: Quasi-Identifier Release Cell Derived Metric Audit. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for quasi-identifier release cell. Embedded packet: Records: R1 cell_count=43 epsilon_requested=68 sensitive_field_count=4; R2 cell_count=52 epsilon_requested=64 sensitive_field_count=7; R3 cell_count=38 epsilon_requested=79 sensitive_field_count=3. Remediation options: O1 changes cell_count by -12% cost=78500; O2 changes epsilon_requested by -18% cost=96100; O3 changes sensitive_field_count by -25% cost=55900; max_budget=121200. Rules and constraints: cell_count<5 suppress; epsilon>1 requires privacy review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver privacy_release_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
